budget.cardSubtitle: A student-friendly budget app to manage limited monthly allowance in a smarter way.
budget.intro1: A household budget application that builds smarter spending habits through data analysis.
budget.intro2: Designed to manage income and expenses intuitively and analyze spending patterns through statistics.
budget.feature3: Average spending analysis and category-based reports
budget.challenge1Problem: Problem: As income and expense data grows, real-time totals and averages become slow or inconsistent.
budget.challenge1Solution: Solution: Maintained immutability in state updates and used useMemo to reduce unnecessary calculations for better performance.
budget.challenge2Problem: Problem: Complex implementation for displaying data grouped by diverse categories.
budget.challenge2Solution: Solution: Used object key-to-category mapping logic to group data efficiently and render it on screen.

site.cardSubtitle: My portfolio website: a personal digital space built with React and Tailwind CSS.
site.intro1: Portfolio built with TypeScript + React + Vite
site.intro2: Supports responsive web and multilingual i18n
site.feature1: Custom Interactive Components: Implemented interactive elements directly with vanilla JavaScript and CSS instead of relying on external libraries.
site.feature2: Modular Code Structure: Organized HTML/CSS/JS by feature for readability and easier maintenance.
site.feature3: Fluid Grid System: Applied ratio-based grids to keep a consistent design across various resolutions.
site.feature4: Performance Monitoring: Optimized asset loading order considering loading speed and rendering performance.
site.challenge1Problem: Problem: Performance degradation (jank) caused by nested animations.
site.challenge1Situation: Situation: Frame drops occurred when multiple interactive elements ran at the same time.
site.challenge1Solution: Solution: Used transform and opacity instead of top and left to minimize repaint/reflow and leverage GPU acceleration, resulting in smoother animation even on low-end devices.
site.challenge2Situation: Situation: CSS Grid layouts rendered differently in specific browsers.
site.challenge2Solution: Solution: Managed vendor prefixes with Autoprefixer and refined Reset CSS to provide the same UI on Chrome, Safari, and Edge.
site.challenge3Problem: Problem: Layout collapse with irregular content lengths.
site.challenge3Situation: Situation: Card heights became uneven depending on project text length.
site.challenge3Solution: Solution: Built a robust layout using CSS Grid grid-template-rows with minmax to keep consistent heights while allowing flexible expansion.
site.structure1: Hero Section: Emphasizes developer identity with intuitive typography.
site.structure2: Core Competencies: Classifies technical strengths in detailed categories.
site.structure3: Project Showcase: Archives projects focused on technical challenges and outcomes.
site.structure4: Professional Journey: Connects fashion industry experience to development capabilities.
site.structure5: Get in Touch: Provides communication channels for collaboration.
